title: Mentor Guide — Day 14 — Growth Engine
coachingQuestions: What happens to your venture if you get twice as many referrals next month?
Are your Year 1 numbers ambitious or realistic given your Business Engine?
What capacity must you build so growth does not depend on you alone?
Which growth strategy — team, systems, technology, partnerships — fits your venture best?
observationAreas: Revenue goal vs Business Engine funnel consistency
Growth Engine Canvas depth (not generic answers)
activityNotes: Approve when revenue targets are realistic, Growth Engine Canvas is specific, FEC Box 6 updated, and pitch checklist is complete.
Flag needs revision when calculations are missing, answers are generic, or numbers don't match the Business Engine from Day 3.
